notes: Publish packages to the registry via POST /api/registry/publish with repo_url
Search packages by keyword via GET /api/registry/search
Resolve package metadata by path via GET /api/registry/$path
Claim a namespace for publishing via POST /api/registry/claim
GitHub webhook integration for automated package updates
Seed the registry with @unofficial packages via POST /api/registry/seed
CLI ship publish command with --dry-run preview and --tag for pre-release dist-tags
CLI ship install resolves dependencies with --frozen lockfile check and --offline mode
